Index.meta_title: NomadPixels AI - Create stunning AI images and videos in seconds
Index.meta_description: NomadPixels AI is an AI content studio for Mongolia — generate images with Flux and videos with Wan 2.2, pay with QPay, SocialPay, or your bank card.

Hero.follow_twitter: An AI content studio built for Mongolia
Hero.title: Create stunning <important>AI images & videos</important> in seconds.
Hero.description: NomadPixels AI turns your ideas into images (Flux) and videos (Wan 2.2), running on rented GPU power — with payment in QPay, SocialPay, and Mongolian bank cards.

Features.section_title: Everything you need to create AI content
Features.section_description: From a text prompt to a finished image or video — fast, affordable, and built for Mongolian creators.
Features.feature1_description: Turn a text prompt into a finished image in seconds using the Flux model.
Features.feature2_description: Create short AI videos from a prompt or a source photo with Wan 2.2.
Features.feature3_description: Pay however is easiest for you — QPay QR, SocialPay, or a Mongolian bank card.
Features.feature4_description: No subscription — buy credits once and spend them only when you generate.
Features.feature5_description: The whole studio is in Mongolian, built for Mongolian creators from day one.
Features.feature6_description: Runs on rented GPU power, so most images and videos finish in well under a minute.

Pricing.section_description: Buy credits and spend them on image or video generations — no subscription required.

FAQ.question1: What models does NomadPixels AI use?
FAQ.answer1: Images are generated with Flux (schnell) and videos with Wan 2.2, both run on rented RunPod GPU infrastructure.
FAQ.answer2: You buy a credit package once and spend credits as you generate — 1 image costs 1 credit, 1 video (5s) costs 8 credits. There's no monthly subscription.
FAQ.answer3: You can pay with a QPay QR code, SocialPay, or a Mongolian bank card. The Стартер packages let you pay per single image or video with a one-off QR payment.
FAQ.question4: What are the Tools (Photo Restore, Face Swap, Voice Changer)?
FAQ.answer4: One-click tools that need no prompt: Photo Restore repairs and recolors old photos, Face Swap generates a new portrait using a face from your photo, and Voice Changer changes a recording's pitch (deep, high, female, child) — the voice changer isn't AI, just audio pitch-shifting.
FAQ.question5: How long does a generation take?
FAQ.answer5: Most images finish in well under a minute; videos take a bit longer since they render more frames. You can watch progress live from your dashboard.
FAQ.question6: Is NomadPixels AI built for Mongolia?
FAQ.answer6: Yes — the whole interface is in Mongolian, pricing is in MNT, and payment methods (QPay, SocialPay, bank cards) are the ones Mongolian users already use.
